title: International teacher recruitment
body: "This research aims to understand international teacher recruitment in England. It examines:   motivations and experiences of international teachers and teacher trainees practices and perceptions of schools and multi-academy trusts (MATs) when recruiting international teachers the role of initial teacher training (ITT) providers and recruitment agencies in supporting international trainee and teacher recruitment barriers and enablers to international recruitment the influence of different policies, such as the international relocation payment (IRP)   The report includes findings from:   surveys with international teachers and trainees interviews with international teachers and trainees teaching or training in England interviews with school and MAT leaders, recruitment agencies and ITT providers   "
